speaker: Diedereich
text: Mmm, smells good. Yet another nice brew.

speaker: Argo
text: It’s delicious, Professor.

speaker: Professor Derich
text: I took Professor Derich up on his offer and stop by for an afternoon coffee.

speaker: Ren
text: There really is something special about looking out at the sea while drinking a cup of coffee.

speaker: Diederich
text: This... is what the sea is all about... *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: It is, isn't it...
We watch the movement of the waves as they crash and break while sipping our drinks. *

speaker: Diedereich
text: 'I’m glad I finally get to share this feelin’ with someone here.’

speaker: Argo
text: Hehehe.

speaker: Diederich
text: It’s been years since I was last on a ship… Can’t help but miss those days, you know? *sigh* ?

speaker: Argo
text: Do you still want to go back out to sea? *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: Yeah... I'd do it now if I could… *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: But I’m a professor now, so I’m stuck here…

speaker: Diederich
text: Well, at least I’m lucky enough to be right next to the sea.

speaker: Argo
text: "Don't worry, I’ll protect you." *sigh*
Professor Derich… It’s too bad he can’t go back out to sea. I understand how he feels…

speaker: Argo
text: ...I wish there was a class for boating or something.

speaker: Diedereich
text: Hm? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What?

speaker: Diederich
text: What was that?
“I was just mumbling to myself, but it seems to have caught his attention.”

speaker: Argo
text: I was just thinking... If we had a boating class, you could use that as an excuse to ride one.

speaker: Diederich
text: That’s it!!!

speaker: Argo
text: Uh-

speaker: Diederich
text: That’s a perfect idea!! Just what I’d expect from a man o’ the sea!!

speaker: Diederich
text: So...! A boating class, huh? ...Hmhmhm...

speaker: Diederich
text: Right then... I should go ask him... *Heh heh heh*

speaker: Argo
text: (Uh... Did I... flip some kind of switch in him?)

speaker: Diederich
text: Ah! Just forget everything I said! *

speaker: Diedereich
text: This never happened, okay!?

speaker: Argo
text: (Don’t get so worked up…)

speaker: Argo
text: Oh yeah, you can use E.P. too, right? *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: Of course.

speaker: Argo
text: What kind of power do you have? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: It’s a secret. *

speaker: Argo
text: What? Now I’m curious.

speaker: Diederich
text: That's not the kinda thing you just go around tellin’ everybody about.

speaker: Argo
text: It isn't?

speaker: Diederich
text: It’s like… Ah, I know… It’s like tellin' everybody the size of your dick.

speaker: Argo
text: Really? You're using that as an example…?

speaker: Diederich
text: In other words, what you did just now was like askin' me how big my dick is.

speaker: Diederich
text: It’s not like it's forbidden. I just don’t go tellin’ every Tom, Dick, and Harry about it. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (I’m not really sure I understand…)
Diederich's affection went up!

speaker: Argo
text: By the way, Professor, can you get any alcohol? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Alcohol? You wanna drink some?

speaker: Argo
text: Not just for myself, I’d like to have a drink with everyone. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Ah, I see... I know exactly how you feel, but...

speaker: Diederich
text: Hmm... There is a wine cellar on campus…

speaker: Argo
text: There is!?! *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: But students aren’t allowed inside it. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What about professors?

speaker: Diederich
text: Of course. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "Don't worry, I’ll protect you." *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: That Celio is pretty strict about it… *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: I could smuggle some drinks if it’s just for you, but no parties… *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I don’t want you to do it just for me. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Ain't comin' here and talkin' to me enough for you? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: This is just a sailor’s meeting.

speaker: Diederich
text: Don’t get cheeky with me.

speaker: Diederich
text: There's plenty of non-alcoholic drinks to buy at the store, you know. Just be patient for now. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (Grant’s not going to like that answer…)

speaker: Argo
text: Well, if you’ll excuse me, I should be leaving soon.

speaker: Diederich
text: All right, come back again sometime. *sigh*
